name: Set Experience
desc: Updates the player's experience bar (level, total XP, progress).

implementation.overview: Updates XP bar: progress (0.0-1.0), total XP, level. Used by XPDisplay modules and AutoEnchant for XP level detection. No module directly targets S1F in the examined client sources.

modules.name: Vanilla Handler (S1FPacketSetExperience)
modules.purpose: Server sends S1FPacketSetExperience to update the client. Processed by NetHandlerPlayClient. No module in the 500+ examined client sources specifically intercepts this packet.
